description:
# [linear] fix(ci): disable npm publish in changeset-release.yml — auto-release owns the release pipeline

## Situation
This feature was requested but PRD generation encountered an issue.

## Problem
fix(ci): disable npm publish in changeset-release.yml — auto-release owns the release pipeline

## Problem

`changeset-release.yml` (the "Version & Release" workflow) fires on every push to `main`. When it finds no changesets (which is always the case now — `auto-release.yml` cleans them up before version bump), it falls through to `changeset publish` and tries to publish all `@protolabs-ai/*` packages to npm.

This fails with 404s for every package because:

1. We don't have `NPM_TOKEN` configured (packages aren't published to npm)
2. All packages show as "not yet published" so changeset tries to publish all of them

The failure is non-blocking (auto-release handles releases correctly via the `v*` tag → `build-electron.yml` pipeline), but it:

* Creates a red CI run on every release
* Adds noise to the Actions tab
* Could confuse future contributors

## Root cause

`changeset-release.yml` was set up to publish packages to npm as part of the changeset workflow. `auto-release.yml` now owns the full release lifecycle (version bump → tag → GitHub Release → Electron builds). The publish step in `changeset-release.yml` is now dead code.

## Fix

One of:

1. Remove the `publish` config from `changeset-release.yml` so it only creates the version-bump PR but never publishes
2. Delete `changeset-release.yml` entirely — `auto-release.yml` already handles everything and our guard (`!startsWith(head_commit.message, 'chore: release v')`) already skips the second run

Option 2 is cleaner given the architecture. Verify `auto-release.yml` covers all cases before deleting.

## Evidence

Run `22509254138` on 2026-02-28: Version & Release failed with 16 `npm warn Received 404` lines followed by publish attempt with no NPM_TOKEN.

## Approach
To be determined after manual review.

## Results
- Feature is implemented as described
- Tests pass

## Constraints
- Needs manual review and refinement

## Research Notes
Here is the structured research summary for this feature:

---

## Research Summary

### Status: **Fix Already Implemented — Needs PR**

The fix has already been applied in commit `b5045a82` on branch `fix/delete-changeset-release`. No PR exists yet.

---

### Problem Confirmed

The deleted `changeset-release.yml` ("Version & Release" workflow) was 80 lines long and did the following on every push to `main`:

1. Triggered on `push: branches: [main]` — fired on every commit
2. Had a guard to skip when the commit message started with `chore: release v` — but `auto-release.yml` *already* consumes and cleans up changesets before committing, so the guard never mattered
3. Ran `changesets/action@v1.7.0` with `publish: npm run changeset:publish` — which tried to publish all `@protolabs-ai/*` packages to npm
4. Configured npm auth with `secrets.NPM_TOKEN` — a secret that doesn't exist in the repo
5. This caused 16 `npm warn Received 404` lines + a failed publish attempt on every release

---
